description_long: This object is a terracotta-colored plant pot with a cylindrical base and a domed, vented lid. The lid features a decorative finial at the top and several cut-out patterns for ventilation, suggesting it may also function as a lantern or decorative cover. The body of the pot is adorned with subtle embossed motifs, adding texture and visual interest. The front of the pot has a large arched opening, likely for placing a plant or possibly a candle inside. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, typical of unglazed ceramic. The overall design is traditional and ornamental, suitable for both functional and decorative use in outdoor or garden settings.
description: A terracotta-colored cylindrical plant pot with a domed, vented lid, decorative embossing, and a large arched front opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched opening, vented domed lid, and decorative finial.
description_view_1: Side view with the arched opening partially visible and the embossed motifs wrapping around the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with no opening, highlighting the smooth, continuous surface and decorative lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the arched opening just out of sight and the embossed motifs visible.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in garden walkways or patios for decorative planting
attribute_decorative_pattern: subtle embossed motifs and vent cut-outs
